hero.title: Understand data.
hero.sub: I help organisations in healthcare, the public sector, and social services turn data into clear, actionable insights.

services.title: What I offer
services.sub: Tailored analyses for complex questions — from raw data processing to strategic recommendations.

items.title: Statistical Analyses
items.desc: Regression, cluster analysis, predictive models — using R at the highest methodological standard, with clear presentation of results.

items.title: Public Health & Health Analytics
items.desc: Epidemiological analyses, healthcare supply analysis and impact measurement for health departments, hospitals and insurers.

items.title: Evaluation & Impact Measurement
items.desc: Scientific evaluation of programmes and projects for NGOs, NPOs and public institutions — with concrete recommendations.

items.title: Literature Review & Evidence Synthesis
items.desc: Systematic literature reviews and synthesis reports as the basis for evidence-based decisions and strategy development.

items.title: Data Visualisation & Reporting
items.desc: Clear reports and visualisations that make complex data accessible to decision-makers without a technical background.

items.title: Policy Impact Assessment
items.desc: Data-driven analysis of policy measures and their societal effects — for cantons, think tanks and policy consultancies.

about.title: Science meets practice
about.p1: I am a PhD candidate in Epidemiology and Public Health with a Master's degree in Sociology and Political Science. This combination allows me not only to analyse data technically, but to understand it in its social and institutional context.
about.p2: My strength lies in combining rigorous quantitative methodology with practical consulting. I don't just deliver numbers — I deliver answers to your specific questions and clear recommendations for action.
about.p3: I work with organisations that want to make data-driven decisions: health offices, hospitals, NGOs, social institutions and research organisations across Switzerland.

portfolio.title: Selected Projects
portfolio.note: All projects are anonymised. Further examples and references available on request.

items.title: Epidemiological Analysis of Chronic Conditions
items.desc: Longitudinal analysis of risk factors for chronic conditions in a population cohort. Logistic regression models and Kaplan-Meier analyses.

items.title: Impact Measurement of a Social Programme
items.desc: Quantitative evaluation of an integration programme for a Swiss NGO. Cluster analysis of target groups, before-after comparison, results report for funders.

items.title: Voting Behaviour and Social Determinants
items.desc: Analysis of social and demographic determinants of voting behaviour in Switzerland. Multivariate regression, visualisations, policy brief.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.sub: Do you have a specific project or would you like to find out how I can help your organisation? I look forward to hearing from you.
contact.formMessagePh: Briefly describe your project or question...
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! I will get back to you within 24 hours.
